overall.description: First-person vehicle driving through a neon-drenched cyberpunk city at night, featuring towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, industrial structures, and futuristic architecture. The footage appears to be from a high-quality game engine such as Cyberpunk 2077, with the vehicle navigating narrow urban streets and stopping intermittently.

events.description: vehicle slows from 17 to 11 units while navigating the street

agents.ego_description: driving through neon-lit street, slowing down while passing the cylindrical advertising tower on the right

layered digital advertisement displays showing various products and brands

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a narrow neon-lit street, passing a prominent cylindrical advertising tower covered in holographic displays on the right. Green-lit skyscrapers line the left side while the dashboard shows the speed decreasing from 17 to 11 units.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with large red pipes

events.description: entering industrial area with large red horizontal pipes crossing overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial section with large red pipes overhead, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: massive horizontal red pipes spanning across the street overhead
multi-level concrete parking garage with visible parking levels

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an industrial underpass dominated by massive red horizontal pipes crossing overhead. The cylindrical advertising tower disappears behind as the vehicle moves deeper into the concrete canyon, with green-lit buildings now visible further to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with vertical signage

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop in the urban canyon

agents.ego_description: coming to a stop in the narrow urban canyon, waiting with zero speed displayed on dashboard

entered.detail: tall vertical illuminated signs mounted on distant buildings
elevated walkways and connecting bridges between buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows to a complete stop in a dense urban canyon, with the speedometer reading zero. Vertical neon signs are visible in the distance between towering building facades, while the industrial pipes from the previous section pass out of view behind the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with AVANTE building and geometric holograms

events.description: vehicle resumes driving from stopped position, accelerating to 13 units
approaching building with large AVANTE signage and geometric holographic displays

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the canyon and approaching the AVANTE building with large holographic displays

entered.detail: building with large illuminated AVANTE signage and glass facade displaying interior
large blue geometric pattern hologram floating beside the street
holographic display with checkerboard pattern and blue illumination
elevated roadway structure running above the street level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates from a stop and approaches a commercial area featuring the prominent AVANTE building on the right with large glass windows. Geometric holographic displays appear on the left side while the vehicle passes under elevated highway structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern architecture street with white curved building

events.description: passing AVANTE building into area with modern white architecture and curved facades

agents.ego_description: driving past the AVANTE building into a section with modern white architecture, maintaining moderate speed

entered.detail: modern white building with curved facade and horizontal lines
very tall skyscraper with multiple vertical signage displays

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes the AVANTE building and enters a section featuring modern white curved architecture on the left. The geometric holograms exit the frame as the vehicle continues toward a distant tall skyscraper with vertical signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis that shifts from narrow industrial corridors to a sleek commercial district. It begins by navigating a tight street past a cylindrical holographic advertising tower and green-lit skyscrapers, with the vehicle gradually slowing as it enters a concrete underpass dominated by massive red overhead pipes. The scene then transitions into a dense urban canyon where the vehicle comes to a complete stop beneath towering facades and distant vertical neon signs. As the vehicle accelerates again, the industrial pipes fade away and the environment opens up into a commercial area featuring the glass-walled AVANTE building and geometric holographic displays under elevated highways. Finally, the camera glides past the AVANTE structure toward modern white curved architecture and a distant, towering skyscraper with vertical signage.
